candidates.name: API Error Pattern Clusterer
candidates.pitch: Uses text similarity clustering on captured network errors to auto-group by error message patterns. Unique vs. generic log analyzers because it targets API error semantics. Ships as Chrome extension w
candidates.pain: Developers waste hours manually grouping similar API errors to identify root causes instead of fixing them.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Batch Contrast Compliance Reporter
candidates.pitch: Scans entire page and flags all text/background pairs failing WCAG 2.1 AA/AAA. Different from single-element checkers by operating at scale. Exports CSV report for remediation tracking.
candidates.pain: Accessibility testers waste time checking color contrast pair-by-pair instead of getting instant batch results.

monetization_hint.model: Freemium → SaaS bridge (paid tier via external Stripe)

candidates.name: Conference Message Queue Scheduler
candidates.pitch: Queues follow-up messages during conference browsing with optimal send-time scheduling. Unique timing angle vs. generic outreach tools. Simple build using LinkedIn's API surface with local storage for
candidates.pain: Sales reps send LinkedIn connection requests during conferences but forget to follow up with personalized messages afterward.

candidates.name: SEC Filing Funding Event Alert
candidates.pitch: Monitors EDGAR for new filings by tracked companies and alerts when funding rounds close. Different from generic news alerts by targeting SEC-sourced signals. Simple RSS monitoring plus company matchi
candidates.pain: Sales teams miss prospect funding announcements that signal buying readiness, losing competitive advantage.

candidates.name: Gong Transcript Follow-up Drafter
candidates.pitch: Uses Gong transcript API to extract key moments and auto-drafts personalized follow-up emails. Different from generic AI email writers by using call-specific context. Requires Gong OAuth integration.
candidates.pain: Sales reps spend 15+ minutes drafting follow-up emails after calls instead of contacting more prospects.

candidates.name: Job Posting Remote Signal Extractor
candidates.pitch: Parses job posting location text to classify as remote/hybrid/onsite with confidence score. Different from tech-stack extractors by targeting work arrangement signals. Regex + light NLP on location fi
candidates.pain: Recruiters and sales reps waste time applying to or prospecting jobs that are hybrid/remote incompatible.

candidates.name: LLM Context Usage Real-time Meter
candidates.pitch: Displays running token count as you type in AI chat interfaces, estimates remaining capacity. Unique real-time angle vs. periodic calculators. Works via DOM observation of chat interfaces.
candidates.pain: AI users hit context limits unexpectedly and lose conversation history because they cannot track token usage.

candidates.name: Prospect Glassdoor Sentiment Overlay
candidates.pitch: Overlays Glassdoor ratings, CEO approval, and culture keywords when visiting prospect company pages. Different from tech-stack tools by measuring workplace sentiment. Uses company domain matching to G
candidates.pain: Sales reps lack cultural fit signals when prospecting enterprise accounts, leading to poor meeting conversion.
